name: Feature Request

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the problem you're running into, not just the feature you want.
     "I want X" is less useful than "I keep having to do Y manually and it's painful." -->

## What would you like llamdrop to do?

<!-- Describe the solution you have in mind. -->

## Who does this help?

<!-- Is this for users on very low RAM? For a specific platform? For beginners? -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Any workarounds you're currently using, or other ways this could be solved. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else — screenshots, examples, links. -->
